title: Video by emergeperformance
description:
Do you get it yet? You see kids playing…

I see athletes training. Just cause it’s a little novel or out of your box doesn’t mean it’s not doing exactly what it’s supposed to do

It is a FACT you’ll run faster chasing or racing. That’s not up for debate. Add in some fun and variability and now you have sports training for young athletes

Sorry we’re not boring…

#ltad #athleticdevelopment #youthsportstraining #sportsperformancetraining #kidathlete
